items.key: ((@@admin = 1) or (ma_dvcs in (select ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and r_access = 1))) and status = '1'
items.check: ((@@admin = 1) or (ma_dvcs in (select ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and r_access = 1)))

dir.commands:
if @@admin <> 1 begin if not exists(select 1 from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and ma_dvcs = @@unit and r_new = 1) begin select 'this.grid._denyNew = true;' as message return end end
&XMLWhenFilterLoading; &XMLWhenFilterClosing;
